sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check what changed - look at the character's new position
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'B' and n['pixels'] == 40:
        print(f"Black char: boundary={n['boundary'][:8]}")
        break

# Check character region
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("\nCharacter area:")
for i in range(14, 25):
    print(f"Row {i}: {ascii_lines[i][16:30]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
